messages.subject: Happy New Year & collaboration in 2026
messages.snippet: Dear Osman, I hope you’re doing well. Just a quick follow-up on my note earlier this year regarding our discussion from last year and potential collaboration in 2026. I wanted to check if this is a good time to reconnect, or
messages.body:
Dear Osman,

I hope you’re doing well.


Just a quick follow-up on my note earlier this year regarding our discussion from last year and potential collaboration in 2026. I wanted to check if this is a good time to reconnect, or if there’s a more suitable point later on.


We’d be happy to share a few relevant examples or explore a light discussion on how viAct could support INTECH Automation & Intelligence’s work in Process automation, integrated control systems, and industrial AI/ML safety applications, if useful.


Looking forward to your thoughts when convenient.

Best regards,

Emmy Le | Overseas Business Development

Website: https://www.viact.ai/

On Wed, Jan 28, 2026 7:20 AM, Emmy Le <emmy.le@bd.viact.ai> wrote:

Hi Osman,


Happy New Year to you and the INTECH Automation & Intelligence team. We were impressed by your large I-Field O&M contract win across 1000+ wells in the Middle East. 

 

As we step into 2026, I wanted to reconnect following our discussion last year around AI monitoring solution via CCTV & mobile cameras. We continue to see strong alignment where viAct’s AI safety analytics can add value to INTECH Automation & Intelligence’s work in Process automation, integrated control systems, and industrial AI/ML safety applications.


As a brief update, this January viAct was recognised in Top 10 AI contributors at Abu Dhabi City Municipality’s Partner & CSR Forum 2025, reinforcing our engagement with government and infrastructure stakeholders.


Happy to explore collaboration opportunities this year.


Warm regards,

Emmy Le | Overseas Business Development

Website: https://www.viact.ai/

messages.body:
Hello Osman,

 


This is to remind that you have inquired on viact.ai for upgrading your workplace with viAct’s AI powered solution!

 

We understand that choosing the right technology for your project is a significant decision, and we want to ensure you have all the information you need. So, if you had missed out on our earlier email here is all about viAct and its groundbreaking AI solution

 

viAct has pioneered in building safer, more productive, and sustainable grounds for various industrial workplaces to operate through its leading ESG-focused Computer Vision/Video Analytics & Generative AI technology by ensuring round-the-clock safety monitoring, cost saving on manual surveillance, enhanced labour productivity, promoting paperless workflows, seamless integration with your existing CCTV cameras.

If you're still considering viAct for your project, kindly answer the following so that we can take this forward:

  1. What is the project exactly? How long is the project expected to last?
  2. What are the key challenges you are facing that you want viAct’s AI system to address?
  3. What is your budget for implementing the AI system? (Just to offer you the best possible pricing!)

Talk Soon! 



Surendra Singh

Growth Lead
viAct

World's First Scenario-Based AI Company

messages.body:
Hello Osman,

 


I wanted to reach out one more time regarding your inquiry on viact.ai!

 

I understand you may be busy but I really wanted to make sure that you had all the information to make an informed decision as you were concerned about updating your project with our AI solution.

 

So, have you checked our earlier emails? If no! Don’t worry, here is more about viAct and its groundbreaking AI solutions.

 

viAct offers 100+ AI modules with AIoT solutions having unparalleled benefits to mitigate safety lapses and improve labour productivity in your project workplace through its leading ESG-focused Computer Vision/Video Analytics & Generative AI technology.

You would love to know that viAct has been recognized by various organizations of repute for the following:

  • Google Startups for sustainability development for viAct’s sustainability approach
  • Deloitte for viAct’s sustainable yet fast growth since inception
  • KPMG for viAct’s amazing innovation for making real estate safer and more productive
  • World Economic Forum as the technology pioneer in AI for risk prone workplaces
  • Forbes as Top 100 to Watch 2022 for using AI for Good

If you're still considering viAct for your project, let’s roll forward. Kindly answer the following so that we can assist you more:

  1. What is the project exactly? How long is the project expected to last?
  2. What are the key challenges you are facing that you want viAct’s AI system to address?
  3. What is your budget for implementing the AI system? (Just to offer you the best possible pricing!)

Thank you for considering viAct. We hope to hear from you soon!



Surendra Singh

Growth Lead
viAct

World's First Scenario-Based AI Company

messages.body:
Hello Osman,

 


I wanted to circle back regarding your inquiry of viact.ai!

 

Since I haven't heard back from you on last email, I wanted to offer some additional information that might pique your interest.

 

As mentioned earlier, viAct has pioneered in building safer, more productive, and sustainable grounds for various industrial workplaces to operate through its leading ESG-focused Computer Vision/Video Analytics & Generative AI technology.



Here is how viAct adds value to your workplace surveillance:

 

  • 10x improved risk assessment compliances with real-time alerts
  • 90% cheaper than humanized work supervision
  • Seamless Integration with current CCTV setup in 3 simple steps
  • Saves 7 hours of daily time spent on paper-based incident record keeping
  • Slashes non-productive hours per worker from 3 hours to mere 30 minutes


Isn’t these important for your project's success?

 


So, to delve further, kindly answer the following questions and we're here to support you every step of the way:


  1. What is the project exactly? How long is the project expected to last?
  2. What are the key challenges you are facing that you want viAct’s AI system to address?
  3. What is your budget for implementing the AI system? (Just to offer you the best possible pricing!)


Looking forward to hearing from you soon! 




Surendra Singh

Growth Lead
viAct

World's First Scenario-Based AI Company

Surendra here!

 

I am glad to see that you visited us recently.

 

It made me feel delighted to see your interest in viAct and would like to take this opportunity to acquaint you more about the organization and our product.

 

With growing concerns about safety lapses, labour productivity and pollution in industrial settings, viAct has pioneered in building safer, productive and eco-friendly ground for industries to operate through its leading ESG-focused, AI and computer vision technology.

messages.subject: Thank you Osman for your enquiry on viAct (viact.ai)
messages.snippet: Hello Osman, I am glad to see that you visited our website recently! It made me feel delighted to see your interest in viAct and would like to take this opportunity to acquaint you more about the organization and our product.
messages.body:
Hello Osman,


I am glad to see that you visited our website recently!

It made me feel delighted to see your interest in viAct and would like to take this opportunity to acquaint you more about the organization and our product.

With growing concerns about safety lapses and labour productivity, viAct has pioneered in building safer, productive and sustainable ground for industries to operate through its leading ESG-focused Computer Vision/Video Analytics & Generative AI technology.

Our proprietary “Scenario Based AI Algorithm” offers easy to deploy, plug and play 100+ AI modules/checkpoints to cover all your challenges:



Commencing the process is effortless: viAct seamlessly integrates with your current CCTV cameras in a matter of minutes, deploys completely within days, and necessitates no additional hardware.

By the way, do you mind answering some questions?

  1. What is the project exactly? How long is the project expected to last?
  2. What are the key challenges you are facing that you want viAct’s AI system to address?
  3. What is your budget for implementing the AI system? (Just to offer you the best possible pricing!)

 

Please feel free to drop a reply with answers and I would be happy to walk you through the best fit solution to resolve it.

 

Talk soon!



Surendra Singh

Growth Lead
viAct
World's First Scenario-Based AI Company

messages.subject: Happy New Year & collaboration in 2026
messages.snippet: Dear Umara, I hope you’re doing well. Just a quick follow-up on my note earlier this year regarding our discussion from last year and potential collaboration in 2026. I wanted to check if this is a good time to reconnect, or
messages.body:
Dear Umara,

I hope you’re doing well.


Just a quick follow-up on my note earlier this year regarding our discussion from last year and potential collaboration in 2026. I wanted to check if this is a good time to reconnect, or if there’s a more suitable point later on.


We’d be happy to share a few relevant examples or explore a light discussion on how viAct could support Araya Solutions’s work in Instore analytics and retail customer experience solutions, if useful.


Looking forward to your thoughts when convenient.

Best regards,

Emmy Le | Overseas Business Development

Website: https://www.viact.ai/

On Wed, Jan 28, 2026 1:23 AM, Emmy L <emmy.l@business.viact.ai> wrote:

Dear Umara,


Happy New Year to you and the Araya Solutions team. We were excited to see your recent partnership with Soter Technologies for vape detection products in the MENA region. 

 

As we step into 2026, I wanted to reconnect following our discussion last year around AI monitoring solution via CCTV & mobile cameras. We continue to see strong alignment where viAct’s AI safety analytics can add value to Araya Solutions’s work in Instore analytics and retail customer experience solutions.


As a brief update, this January viAct was recognised in Top 10 AI contributors at Abu Dhabi City Municipality’s Partner & CSR Forum 2025, reinforcing our engagement with government and infrastructure stakeholders.


Happy to explore collaboration opportunities this year.


Warm regards,

Emmy Le | Overseas Business Development

Website: https://www.viact.ai/

Look forward to hearing from you, 
Christine

messages.subject: iSaned x viAct - viMov solution
messages.snippet: Hi Faraaz, Thank you again for your time. It was a pleasure speaking with you and learning more about your client’s requirements as well as the broader potential for future collaboration across your construction and manufactu
messages.body:
Hi Faraaz, 

Thank you again for your time. It was a pleasure speaking with you and learning more about your client’s requirements as well as the broader potential for future collaboration across your construction and manufacturing accounts.

As discussed, here are the next steps from my side:

  1. Share initial materials - please find below:

    • An overview of the ViMov (portable kit) product

    • Our suggested use cases list

    • A snapshot of our commercial framework:

  • viMov kit: Renting model - $999 per month per set. 
  • AI modules: monthly subscription based on the number of cams and AI modules we finalize.

  1. Use case confirmation - Once you review these internally, please shortlist the 4–5 key use cases and confirm the number of cameras (2 or 4), so we can assess feasibility and prepare accurate pricing.

  2. Customization note - If any required use cases are not on the list, we can still support them with minor customization, as long as the logic is defined and feasible for portable hardware.

  3. Timeline - I understand this request is for budgetary planning, with potential execution around Jan-Feb 2026. This timeline works for us.

Once you consolidate the information from your client, feel free to share via email or WhatsApp. I’ll be happy to continue supporting the evaluation and prepare the quotation accordingly.

Regards, 

Christine

messages.subject: [viAct] Follow-up: Next Steps for AI Video Analytics Proposal
messages.snippet: Dear Amro, Thank you very much for your time yesterday and for sharing detailed information about your current laboratory project and future AI initiatives in Saudi Arabia. We’re very happy to see your strong interest in coll
messages.body:
Dear Amro,

Thank you very much for your time yesterday and for sharing detailed information about your current laboratory project and future AI initiatives in Saudi Arabia. We’re very happy to see your strong interest in collaborating with viAct and exploring a partnership to bring advanced AI analytics to your clients.

As discussed, our team is ready to prepare a full technical and commercial proposal tailored to your project. To proceed efficiently, could you please help confirm the following points:

Pending Information Required

  1. Camera allocation per AI function

    • Out of the 64 cameras available, please confirm how many cameras you would like to apply for each AI use case (e.g., presence detection, activity monitoring, man-down, etc.).

  2. Definition of “Active” vs. “Inactive” behavior

    • Kindly check with the lab client which actions specifically they consider active (e.g., working with machine/laptop) and inactive (e.g., using phone, sitting idle).

    • This will help us design the right AI logic for accurate detection: for example, if fewer actions for inactive definition, we should detect when people are inactive instead of active.

  3. Site plan / camera layout

    • If available, please share a simple layout or indication of camera positions and zones to be monitored.

  4. Budget range or expected pricing level

    • Understanding your target range will allow us to optimize cost and structure the partnership pricing accordingly.

  5. Competitor quotation (Vision / Verina)

    • If possible, please share their offer or indicative pricing so we can align our proposal competitively.

  6. Duration of system usage / maintenance

    • Please confirm if the client expects the system to be permanent after 12 months or only for a one-year contract with renewal option.

 Next Steps

  • Once we receive the above details, viAct will:

    • Prepare a detailed technical proposal (scope, system architecture, and camera-wise AI modules).

    • Provide a commercial quotation with flexible pricing for your partner margin.

    • Share a demo account for you to explore our dashboard and alert features.

Please feel free to send the details via email or WhatsApp whenever convenient.
We truly appreciate your support and look forward to building a successful partnership together in Saudi Arabia.

Kind Regards,


Emmy Le | Senior Business Consultant


Website: https://www.viact.ai/
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/viactai/
